title: 🐾 Home Alone 🐾
intro: With Mom and Dad headed out to celebrate, Honey Bear is absolutely convinced this is her moment to shine, but she has been watching Kevin McCallister way too much! From hallway victory laps to ice-cream-powered poor decisions, the girls take one tiny checklist mistake and turn it into a full-scale New Year’s adventure, complete with consequences! 🎊😴

title: ✨ Midnight Challenge ✨
intro: 🕰️ December 30th brings big plans and even bigger bravado as Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle challenge each other to stay up till midnight as practice for New Year’s Eve. Confidence is high, eyelids are heavy, and the struggle is real. So who will win the Midnight Challenge? 🐾😴

title: 🐾 Fireworks 💙
intro: For Honey Bear, fireworks aren’t fun or festive. When the explosions start, fear takes over with shaking paws, racing heart, memories she can’t escape. And she’s not alone. Many dogs and many veterans living with PTSD experience the very same thing. Those booming “wonders in the sky” can reopen painful memories and make nights (and sometimes entire days while they are going off) incredibly hard. This episode is a reminder to lead with compassion. If you’re celebrating, please remember families, pets, and people nearby who are struggling. Limiting fireworks to a few hours and being mindful of others truly makes a difference. 🐶 💛 🐱

title: ✨ Mom’s Night Off 🍕
intro: 🐶🐱 Mom needed a well-earned night off after all that cooking. Honey Bear proudly orders pizza delivery, only to discover her trusty plastic Princess Phone isn’t exactly connected to the real world. But when Dad calls out, “Who wants treats?”…does he mean dog treats? Cat treats? Or pizza? One thing’s certain… chaos is always on the menu in Summerville.📞🍕

title: 🧡🐾 The Princess Honey Bear 🐾🧡
intro: 🏰⚔️👑 Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle go full cosplay in a playful homage to director Rob Reiner’s classic tale “The Princess Bride.” They’re just two sisters enjoying their Christmas gifts until the “duel” gets a little too convincing and the sass level hits INCONCEIVABLE proportions with the kind of hijinx only these two can deliver. 😹🐶💥

title: 🎄 Bring Back Christmas 🎄,
intro: It’s the day after Christmas and Bootsie Belle’s gears start turning as she decides the only logical solution is to build a Babbage-style Time Machine to rewind the calendar back to Christmas Day. Tiny problem…apparently all Christmas Magic requires Santa approval…and Santa is on VACATION! 🏖️🎅😂

title: 🎄 Christmas Morning Chaos 🎄
intro: 🎁 It’s Christmas morning in Summerville and calm was never an option for Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle! From enthusiastic unwrapping to ribbon-related incidents and towering mountains of wrapping paper, Summerville’s Sisters discover that the true magic of Christmas Morning is chaos, laughter, and sticking together. Follow along as the girls remind us that the best holiday moments aren’t perfect — they’re shared. 💕🐾
